features.name: array sum with int cast comparison constraint
features.description: Code should include an array.sum() constraint using int'(item == variable) to count matching elements

features.name: array sum with inside conditional constraint implication
features.description: Code should include array.sum() with expression inside a conditional constraint using implication operator (->)

features.name: array sum with referencing foreach loop variable
features.description: Code should include array.sum() with expression where the with clause references a foreach loop index variable
features.snippet: foreach(array[i]) { array[i] != X -> array.sum() with (int'(item == array[i])) == 1; }
